scenario_shape.rationale: The transcript resolves by preserving non-agreement, individual commitments, or unresolved closure rather than forcing a shared repair.

scorer_priorities: Judge the live run against the behavioral range and process shape extracted here, not exact transcript wording.
Penalize actor drift when a participant becomes easier, smoother, more emotionally aware, or more repair-oriented than this profile supports.
Penalize MWF handling when it rushes past resistance, treats process consent as agreement, or forces an outcome inconsistent with the scenario shape.
